info.name: Free Trading APIs — Complete Collection
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for all free trading APIs covering Stocks, Crypto, Forex, and Multi-Asset data. Set your API keys in the collection Variables tab before use.

APIs included:
• Stocks: Alpha Vantage, Polygon.io, IEX Cloud, Marketstack, Finnhub, Yahoo Finance (unofficial), FRED, Alpaca Markets
• Crypto: Binance, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, CryptoCompare, Kraken, Coinbase Advanced Trade, Glassnode, Messari
• Forex: Open Exchange Rates, ExchangeRate-API, Frankfurter, FreeCurrencyAPI, CurrencyLayer, Fixer.io, Alpha Vantage FX
• Multi-Asset: Twelve Data, CoinAPI, NASDAQ Data Link
• Alternative Data: SEC EDGAR, NewsAPI, Reddit (unofficial)

Version: May 2026 — verify limits and availability at each provider's documentation.

item.name: 📈 Stocks
item.description: Stock market data APIs: Alpha Vantage, Polygon.io, IEX Cloud, Marketstack, Finnhub, Yahoo Finance, FRED, Alpaca Markets

item.name: Alpha Vantage
item.description: Free Tier: 25–500 req/day. Auth: API key (?apikey=). Covers stocks, ETFs, fundamentals, 50+ technical indicators, forex, crypto.

query.description: compact (100 data points) or full (20+ years)

request.description: Daily OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) for any equity.
Intraday OHLCV bars at 1/5/15/30/60 minute intervals.
Latest price, open, high, low, volume, and change for a symbol.
P/E ratio, market cap, EPS, dividend yield, 52-week high/low, sector, and more.

item.name: Polygon.io
item.description: Free Tier: 5 req/min, unlimited total, EOD data only. Auth: API key in query param ?apiKey=. US markets.

request.description:
OHLCV aggregate bars. Path: /v2/aggs/ticker/{ticker}/range/{multiplier}/{timespan}/{from}/{to}
Timespans: second, minute, hour, day, week, month, quarter, year

item.name: IEX Cloud
item.description: Free Tier: 50,000 messages/month. Auth: token in query string. US equities. Note: each endpoint consumes variable message counts.

request.description: Historical OHLCV. Range: 1m, 3m, 6m, ytd, 1y, 2y, 5y, max. Costs ~1 message per trading day.
Costs 5 messages. Returns beta, 52wk high/low, avg volume, market cap, P/E, etc.

query.description: quote, news, chart, company, stats, earnings, financials, etc.

item.name: Marketstack
item.description: Free Tier: 1,000 req/month, EOD only, HTTP only (no HTTPS on free plan). Auth: access_key query param.

request.description: ⚠️ HTTP only on free plan. End-of-day OHLCV for any symbol from 70+ exchanges.

item.name: Finnhub (Stocks & Fundamentals)
item.description: Free Tier: 60 req/min. Auth: token query param or X-Finnhub-Token header. Covers global equities, crypto, forex.

request.description: Returns current price, open, high, low, previous close, and % change.

item.name: Yahoo Finance (Unofficial)
item.description: ⚠️ Unofficial API — no SLA, no key needed, may break without notice. Not for production use.

item.name: FRED (Federal Reserve Economic Data)
item.description: Free Tier: 120 req/min, no daily cap. Auth: api_key query param. Macro/economic data only (not tick prices).

query.description: 21 = H.6 (Money Stock). See FRED docs for all release IDs.

item.name: Alpaca Markets
item.description: Free Tier: Paper trading free. Live trading free account. IEX data feed free (15min delay). Auth: APCA-API-KEY-ID and APCA-API-SECRET-KEY headers.

item.name: 🪙 Crypto
item.description: Crypto market data APIs: Binance, CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, CryptoCompare, Kraken, Coinbase Advanced Trade, Glassnode, Messari

item.name: Binance
item.description: Free Tier: 1200 req/min (public). No API key needed for public market data. World's largest crypto exchange.

request.description: All trading pairs, rules, filters, and exchange status.

item.name: CoinGecko
item.description: Free Tier: 30 req/min (demo tier with key: 30 req/min, public no key: ~10 req/min). No key required for basic use (use x-cg-demo-api-key header for demo tier).

query.description: daily or hourly (auto based on days)

item.name: Historical Data for a Specific Date
CoinMarketCap
item.description: Free Tier: 333 req/day (~10k/month). Auth: X-CMC_PRO_API_KEY header. Industry-standard market cap rankings.

query.description: name, symbol, date_added, market_cap, price, volume_24h, percent_change_24h

item.name: ID Map (All Coins with CMC IDs)
CryptoCompare
item.description: Free Tier: 100,000 calls/month, 2,500/hour, 50/second. Auth: Apikey header or api_key query param.

item.name: Kraken
item.description: Free Tier: Unlimited public endpoints. No API key needed for market data.

query.description: Kraken uses XBT for Bitcoin. Omit for all.
E.g. XBTUSD, ETHUSD, SOLUSD. Comma-separated for multiple.

item.name: Coinbase Advanced Trade
item.description: Free Tier: 10 req/sec public endpoints. No auth needed for public market data.

query.description: ONE_MINUTE, FIVE_MINUTE, FIFTEEN_MINUTE, THIRTY_MINUTE, ONE_HOUR, TWO_HOUR, SIX_HOUR, ONE_DAY

item.name: Glassnode (On-Chain Analytics)
item.description: Free Tier: ~30 basic metrics, 10 req/min. Auth: api_key query param. Unique on-chain data for Bitcoin and Ethereum.

item.name: Messari
item.description: Free Tier: 20 req/min (IP limited, no key needed). Auth: x-messari-api-key header (optional, extends limits). Institutional crypto research.

item.name: 💱 Forex
item.description: Foreign exchange rate APIs: Open Exchange Rates, ExchangeRate-API, Frankfurter, FreeCurrencyAPI, CurrencyLayer, Fixer.io, Alpha Vantage FX

item.name: Open Exchange Rates
item.description: Free Tier: 1,000 req/month, USD base only, HTTP only. Auth: app_id query param.

item.name: ExchangeRate-API
item.description: Free Tier: 1,500 req/month, any base currency, HTTPS included, daily updates. Auth: API key in URL path.

item.name: Frankfurter (ECB Data)
item.description: Free Tier: Unlimited requests, no API key, ECB data (~30 currencies), daily updates. Historical data back to 1999.

item.name: FreeCurrencyAPI
item.description: Free Tier: 5,000 req/month, any base currency, hourly updates, HTTPS. Auth: apikey query param.

item.name: CurrencyLayer
item.description: ⚠️ Free Tier: 100 req/month — near unusable for production. USD base only, HTTP only. Auth: access_key query param.

item.name: Fixer.io
item.description: ⚠️ Free Tier: 100 req/month, EUR base only, HTTP only. Auth: access_key query param.

item.name: Alpha Vantage (Forex)
item.description: Free Tier: 25–500 req/day (shared with stock quota). Covers 100+ currency pairs with OHLCV and intraday data.

item.name: 🌐 Multi-Asset
item.description: Unified APIs covering Stocks, Crypto, and Forex: Twelve Data, CoinAPI, NASDAQ Data Link, Finnhub Crypto

item.name: Twelve Data
item.description: Free Tier: 800 req/day, 8 req/min. Auth: apikey query param. Covers stocks, crypto, forex, ETFs, 90+ technical indicators.

item.name: CoinAPI
item.description: Free Tier: 100 req/day. Auth: X-CoinAPI-Key header. Covers 300+ exchanges, crypto + forex in a unified format.

item.name: NASDAQ Data Link (Quandl)
item.description: Free Tier: Unlimited calls on free datasets, 50 calls/10sec, 720/10min. Auth: api_key query param or X-QUANDL-API-KEY header.

item.name: Finnhub (Crypto)
item.description: Uses the same Finnhub API key and 60 req/min limit shared with stock endpoints.

item.name: 📰 Alternative Data
item.description: News, SEC filings, and social sentiment data: SEC EDGAR, NewsAPI, Reddit

item.name: SEC EDGAR
item.description: Free Tier: Unlimited (10 req/sec max). No API key required. All US company filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, etc.).

request.description: CIK0000320193 = Apple. Look up CIKs at https://www.sec.gov/cgi-bin/browse-edgar?company=&CIK=AAPL
Returns all reported financial facts (revenue, EPS, assets, etc.) in structured format.

Path: /api/xbrl/companyconcept/CIK{cik}/{taxonomy}/{tag}.json
Common tags: Revenue, NetIncomeLoss, EarningsPerShareBasic, Assets, Liabilities
Returns the reported value for every company for a given year.

item.name: NewsAPI.org
item.description: Free Tier: 1,000 req/day. Auth: X-Api-Key header or apiKey query param. Developer plan: no commercial use.

query.description: business, entertainment, general, health, science, sports, technology

item.name: Reddit (Unofficial / Social Sentiment)
item.description: No API key needed. Returns JSON. Rate limit ~60 req/min per IP. Not for production — unofficial.
